## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is the Pubcast Shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're going to talk about the importance of experimentation. Let's go! This is the number one skill that you can have as an advertiser. Those who are most successful with Facebook ads have an underlying curiosity that others do not. They align their goals with a basic understanding of how things work and they experiment. They don't ask, should I do this? They throw caution to the wind and they try it. They may use tools the way they weren't intended, but they don't so much care why the tool was created or how others are using it. Those who are successful, don't worry about perfection. They know that when you embrace experimentation, much of what you do won't work. You apply what you learn to be more profitable and successful next time. When you're constantly experimenting, when you use tools creatively, you might discover things that others won't. Because you're not waiting to find out how others are doing things. You're focused on finding out what works best for you. I encourage you to be curious. Worry less about how others are doing things and experiment. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
